title: Consumer forum refused to give certified copies of arrest orders: Salman Khan to NCDRC in case over Rajshree ad
description: Bollywood actor Salman Khan on Tuesday told the National Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (NCDRC) that the Jaipur District Consumer Commission treated him unfairly and refused to provide certified copies of its orders in proceedings arising from a complaint over a misleading advertisement. [Salman Salim Khan v. Yogendra Badiyal]The district consumer forum at Jaipur had recently issued bailable warrants against Khan for failing to comply with its orders to take down his ad for “Rajshree Ela
